'''Simonelle''' was an [[Ingoian]] scientist that picked up experimentation with [[Human replica droid|HRDs]] when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Project Decoy]] failed. He was the creator of [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] assassin droid, [[Guri]].

{{Char-stub}}
